9f5cf90e6737.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
9f5cf90e6737.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
9f5cf90e6737.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

e26690318c78.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
e26690318c78.description: Last inspected 125.4 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
e26690318c78.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
e26690318c78.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

6e5fa0e45997.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
6e5fa0e45997.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

ce3b90e9c707.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
ce3b90e9c707.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
ce3b90e9c707.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

4c9810ec7229.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
4c9810ec7229.description: At 127 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
